LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SessionExpired.Title: Server session expired
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SessionExpired.Message: The server session has expired. You can try to resume it or return to the main menu.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SessionExpired.Status: The server session has expired. Log in again.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SessionExpired.ConnectionLost: The server connection was interrupted. Try to resume after the server is available.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SessionExpired.ReconnectNotPl: This game state cannot reconnect in place. Return to the main menu.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SessionExpired.ReconnectMissi: The colony or snapshot identity is incomplete. Return to the main menu.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SessionExpired.ReconnectBusy: A save or sync operation is still running. Try again shortly.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SessionExpired.ReconnectAtomi: This operation has not been confirmed by the server. Return to the main menu to avoid a forked state.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SessionExpired.ReconnectSnaps: The server snapshot has changed. Return to the main menu and reload it.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SessionExpired.ReconnectIdent: The server returned a different player identity. Return to the main menu.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Chat.StatusNotConnected: You are not in the server yet.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Network.StatusNotConfigured: Server address, account, or colony is not configured.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Chat.Title: Chat
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Account.PasswordNoSession: You must be in a server session to change the password.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.DefensePoint.AssignGizmoDesc: Bind a colonist to this defense point. During a raid, the colonist will follow the defensive behavior configured on this point.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.DefensePoint.AssignHumanlikeO: Only humanlike colonists can be assigned.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.DefensePoint.AssignMechGizmoD: Bind a mech to this mech defense point. During a raid, the mech will follow the defensive behavior configured on this point.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.DefensePoint.AssignMechOnly: Only your colony mechs can be assigned.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.DefensePoint.AssignPlayerOnly: Only your colony members can be assigned.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.DefensePoint.ModeGizmoDesc: Set this defense point's defensive behavior on offline raid battlefields. Hold tries to stay and shoot from this cell, Defend moves nearby, Assault attacks invaders directly, and Operate equipment tries to use nearby mortars or other mannable defensive weapons.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.DefensePoint.RangeGizmoDesc: Set this defense point's action range. This affects patrol range and operation range.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.DefensePoint.PlaceBlockedBuil: Defense points cannot be placed on buildings, blueprints, or frames.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.DefensePoint.PlaceBlockedDefe: This cell already has a defense point.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.ManifestMissing: The server did not return a mod list.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.ManifestParseFa: The server mod list could not be parsed.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.ManifestBuildFa: Could not build the full local mod list. Check the client log.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.ServerProfileSi: This game was started with a server configuration. Restart to restore your local configuration before starting or loading a single-player game.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.ApplyAndRestart: Apply the server mod list and load order, then restart the game.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.ConfigApplyOver: Use the server configuration as an overlay without modifying local Config files, then restart the game.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.ConfigOverwrite: Write the server configuration to local Config files, remove the active server overlay, then restart the game.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.ConfigApplyAvai: For configuration differences, use the server overlay or overwrite local configuration before restarting.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.OverrideBaselin: Replace the server manifest baseline with this client's mod list, file hashes, and configuration rules. This affects future joins for every player; use only after verifying this environment.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.Override.ModLis: The current client mod list or load order does not match the server baseline. If you continue, the server will use this client as the new baseline. Make sure you did not load a local single-player mod list.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.SummaryFilesMan: . File differences cannot be auto-fixed. Update mods or wait for a server update.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.SummaryAdminCan: . After a server update, you can save new server data.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.FileMismatchCan: File differences cannot be auto-fixed. Update the matching mods or wait for an administrator to update the server data.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.ManifestApplyAl: When the mod list, load order, DLCs, and files match, the server mod list can be applied and the game restarted.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.UnexpectedLocal: Local mod is not approved by the server
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.LoadOrderMismat: Load order position {INDEX} does not match
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.FileTimeHintCli: <color=#ffd166>Hint: the server file modification time is newer, so the local mod may need an update.</color>
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.FileTimeHintSer: <color=#ffd166>Hint: the local file modification time is newer, so the server data may need an administrator update.</color>
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.WorkshopHintCli: <color=#ffd166>Hint: Steam reports that the local Workshop mod may need an update.</color>
<color=#ffd166>Hint: the server data has a newer Workshop install time, so the local mod may need an update.</color>
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.WorkshopHintSer: <color=#ffd166>Hint: the local Workshop install time is newer, so the server data may need an administrator update.</color>
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.WorkshopHintUnc: <color=#ffd166>Hint: this is a Workshop mod difference, but the side needing an update cannot be inferred reliably.</color>
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.ServerIssueFall: The server did not return details.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.Issue.GameLangu: Game language differs from the server world language
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.Issue.FileHashM: Mod file contents do not match
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.Override.AdminB: Admin price table and trap list updated: {PRICECOUNT} prices, {AUTOCOUNT} auto-detected traps, {CANDIDATECOUNT} candidates.
Admin price table and trap list update failed.
Admin price table and trap list were not updated: {MESSAGE}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.Override.Title: Update server data
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Compatibility.ModSettingsLock: Only administrators can change mod settings during a multiplayer session.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ServerEntry.Title: Entering server
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Storyteller.SettingsLocked: Storyteller and difficulty are locked by server settings during multiplayer sessions.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Storyteller.AdminSyncRejected: Server rejected storyteller and difficulty sync: {CODE} {MESSAGE}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ServerEntry.ModUnavailable: The multiplayer module is not ready yet. Close this window and try again shortly; restart the game if the problem continues.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ServerEntry.ServerHelloReject: The server rejected the version check.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ServerEntry.ProtocolMismatch: The client and server versions are incompatible. Client {CLIENT}, server {SERVER}. Update the client or wait for the administrator to update the server.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.WorldBaseline.StatusConfigMis: Initial world configuration was not submitted: server, user, or colony is not configured.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.WorldBaseline.StatusInvalid: Initial world configuration was not submitted: current world setup could not be accepted, {REASON}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.WorldBaseline.StatusSubmittin: Submitting initial world configuration and administrator data.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.WorldBaseline.StatusSubmitted: Initial world configuration submitted; administrator data registered: prices {PRICECOUNT}, auto-detected traps {TRAPAUTO}, candidates {TRAPCANDIDATE}.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.WorldBaseline.FailureMissingF: Missing vanilla world generation faction list.
Missing world features; the world setup may have been captured too early.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ExistingColonyLoadFlow: The server already has this player colony: {USER}/{COLONY}, latest save {SNAPSHOT}. Restoring the save from the server.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ExistingColonyMissingSnapshot: The server has this colony, but no downloadable latest save is available.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.DownloadExistingSnapshotMissi: The server did not return a complete save.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.DownloadExistingSnapshotMisma: Server returned a different save: expected {EXPECTED}, actual {ACTUAL}.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ExistingSnapshotRestored: Server save {SNAPSHOT} was restored. Loading save.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.FirstAdminWorldConfigurationF: You are the first administrator. Entering initial world configuration: {USER}/{COLONY}.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftDropPodArrivedMessage: A gift has arrived via transport pods.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.TradeDropPodArrivedMessage: Trade goods have arrived via transport pods.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.JoinExistingWorldFlow: The server already has world configuration. Entering join flow: {USER}/{COLONY}.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.LocalAtomicMutation.Waiting: {OPERATION} is waiting for the server. Retry first, or return to the main menu and reload the server save.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Menu.UploadSnapshotAndQuitToM: Save progress and return to main menu
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Menu.UploadSnapshotBusy: A multiplayer sync operation is already running.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Menu.UploadSnapshotNoSession: No logged-in multiplayer session is active.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.AutosaveSnapshot.SkippedBusy: Auto save upload skipped: sync is already running.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.AutosaveSnapshot.SkippedNoSes: Auto save upload skipped: no tracked multiplayer save is active.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SnapshotRestore.PackageMissin: The server did not return save contents.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SnapshotRestore.PayloadSizeMi: The server save size does not match.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SnapshotRestore.OriginalSizeM: The original server save size does not match.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SnapshotRestore.OriginalHashM: The original server save failed check.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SnapshotRestore.InvalidXml: The server save could not be read as a RimWorld save.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SnapshotRestore.MetadataRewri: Failed to prepare the server save before loading: {MESSAGE}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SnapshotUpload.NotConfigured: Server address, account, or colony is not configured, so the save cannot be uploaded.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SnapshotUpload.ServerRejected: The server rejected the save upload.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SnapshotUpload.NoRunningGame: No game is running, so the first server save cannot be created.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SnapshotUpload.LineageMissing: The running game has no server save marker, so it cannot be confirmed as server-tracked.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SnapshotUpload.LineageMismatc: The running game is not the server save. Server save: {SERVER}; current save: {LOCAL}. Abandon this state and rejoin from the server.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SnapshotPackage.MissingIdenti: Account or colony is not configured, so the save cannot be prepared.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SnapshotPackage.MissingSavePa: There is no save content to upload.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SnapshotPackage.MissingRimWor: The save is missing its game version, so the server will reject it.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Multiplayer.PlayerLocationUna: This player has no colony tile to locate yet.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Scoreboard.Title: Wealth ranking
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Achievement.GetTrophyBlueprin: Create a trophy plan recording this achievement.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Achievement.TrophyNoMap: Enter a colony map before placing a trophy.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Achievement.TrophyMissingDef: Achievement trophy definition was not found.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Achievement.TrophyPlanMissing: Achievement trophy plan definition was not found.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Achievement.TrophyPlanCreated: Trophy plan created. Select the plan to choose material and place the trophy blueprint.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Achievement.TrophyPlanCreateF: Could not create the trophy plan.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Achievement.PlaceTrophyDesc: Choose material and place a trophy blueprint recording this achievement.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Achievement.EndgameShipColoni: Colonists left on a launched ship
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Endgame.ConfirmationText: This action will trigger an ending and force a save. Continue?
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Endgame.UploadSucceeded: Ending result synced to the server.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Players.NoneRegistered: The server has no registered players.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Players.StatusCannotSelectSel: The current player cannot be selected as a diplomacy target.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Sync.StatusNotConfigured: Server address, account, or colony is not configured, so sync cannot run.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Sync.StatusSnapshotMissing: No current server save exists, so distant messages cannot sync.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Events.StatusNoDetails: There are no new server messages.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Events.StatusAutoMerged: Automatic server message sync is already running; merged new notification: {REASON}.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Events.StatusAutoNoEvents: Automatic sync complete: there are no new server messages.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Events.StatusNoViewableDetail: There are no viewable server messages.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Events.StatusAutoAppliedConfi: Handled {COUNT} messages automatically. Saving the current state.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Events.StatusAutoConfirmCompl: Automatic message handling complete: accepted {ACCEPTED}, rejected {REJECTED}, server save updated.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.PawnPackage.UploadRejected: Person information rejected by the server: {CODE} {MESSAGE}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.PawnPackage.StoreMissingId: The server did not return a person entry.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.PawnPackage.DownloadRejected: Person information download rejected by the server: {CODE} {MESSAGE}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.PawnPackage.DownloadMissingPa: The server did not return person information.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.PawnExchange.ValidatorSupport: Support colonist information could not be accepted.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.PawnExchange.ValidatorAnimalG: The gifted creature is not an animal.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.PawnExchange.ValidatorTradePa: The traded person or animal does not meet the requirement.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.PawnExchange.ValidatorGiftPaw: The gifted person or animal does not meet the requirement.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.PawnExchange.ValidatorCorpseG: The gifted corpse information could not be accepted.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.PawnExchange.ValidatorInvalid: Person information type could not be accepted.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.PawnExchange.StatusIdeoCatalo: Ideo restore failed: missing server ideo catalog.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Xenotype.StatusBiotechMissing: Biotech is not active, so the custom xenotype cannot be registered.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Xenotype.StatusGameMissing: No game instance is available, so the custom xenotype cannot be registered.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Xenotype.StatusXmlTooLarge: Custom xenotype information exceeds the size limit.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Xenotype.StatusHashMismatch: Custom xenotype details could not be checked.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Xenotype.StatusVanillaLoadFai: The vanilla loader could not read the custom xenotype.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SnapshotUpload.Busy: Sync is already running; save upload cannot start.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Presence.StatusNotConfigured: Server address, account, or colony is not configured, so online status cannot be kept.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Presence.StatusSessionMissing: Server session is empty, so the online connection cannot be opened.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Presence.StatusLedgerChangedS: New server messages are available. Syncing.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.MapSession.StatusNoMap: No map is loaded, so an in-game server session cannot be created.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.MapSession.StatusNotConfigure: Server address, account, or colony is not configured, so joining cannot start.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.MapSession.StatusPackagingCur: Preparing and uploading the current save.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.MapSession.StatusUploadAborte: Join aborted: save upload was not accepted.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Target.StatusMissing: No target player or colony is selected. Refresh the player list and select a target first.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Target.StatusSelf: This operation cannot target the current player.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RemoteWorldObject.RaidActionN: Raids must be created through the formal raid flow and cannot enter directly from this shell world object.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RemoteWorldObject.ReinforceAc: Reinforcement requires a caravan to arrive at the target tile, then use the caravan command to select support colonists.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RemoteWorldObject.RaidActionN: The raid entrance will be connected in the live raid loop; use the multiplayer window to inspect the target for now.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RemoteWorldObject.ReinforceAc: Reinforcement appears on the caravan command once a caravan reaches this tile.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RuntimeConfigurationMissing: Server address, account, or colony is incomplete.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.StartingSiteBlockedByServerCo: This tile is adjacent to a server-registered colony: {SITE}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.WorldMap.StatusNotConfigured: Server address, account, or colony is not configured, so world map markers cannot be synced.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.WorldMap.StatusWorldObjectsMi: World objects are not initialized yet, so world map markers cannot be synced.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.WorldMap.StatusSyncing: Syncing authoritative server world map markers.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.WorldMap.StatusCaravanTargets: Caravan position changed. Refreshing trade and reinforcement targets.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.WorldMap.StatusNoMarkers: Server returned no world map markers.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.WorldCatalog.StatusNotConnect: Not connected to a server, so the world catalog cannot be refreshed.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.WorldCatalog.StatusNoConfigur: World catalog refresh complete: server returned no world configuration.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.WaitingFirstAdminWorldConfigu: The server is waiting for the first administrator to finish initial world configuration.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.WorldConfiguredButMissingConf: The server reports an existing world configuration but did not return the configuration data.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.WorldSessionConfigMissing: Server address, account, or colony is not configured; cannot request a world session.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventQueue.RequiresSnapshotCo: , waiting for progress to be saved
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventDetails.Empty: There are no message details to show.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.AcceptUnsupported: This message type cannot be accepted by the current client yet.
This {TYPE} message cannot be accepted by the current client yet.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.ActionMissingDeta: Message details have not been downloaded yet. Resyncing.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.RejectUnsupported: This {TYPE} message cannot be rejected by the current client yet.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.GenericAction: A message from afar requires the colony's attention.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.GiftAction: You can accept, reject, or postpone. If accepted, the gift will arrive on the current map and the current state will be saved afterward.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.GiftIntro: A gift from {SENDER} is waiting for your decision.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.ForcedGiftIntro: {SENDER} has forcibly delivered items to your colony.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.ForcedGiftAction: This forced delivery cannot be rejected. After acceptance, the items will arrive by the specified delivery method and the current state will be saved.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.GiftItemsEmpty: This gift has no landable items.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.GiftItemsUnavaila: The gift item list could not be parsed.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.GiftReturnAction: Returned gifts cannot be rejected. If accepted, the items will arrive on the current map and the current state will be saved. You can also postpone.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.GiftReturnIntro: A gift rejected by {SENDER} is being returned.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.RaidAction: A hostile action is waiting for your attention. You can inspect the related site on the world map or handle it later.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.RaidSettlementInt: The raid has ended and defender losses have been counted.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.RaidNoDefenderLos: The raid has ended. You took no losses in this raid.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.RaidAttackerLossI: The following colonists were lost during the raid:
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.TradeAction: A trade state has changed. You can open the market for details or handle it later.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.TradeDeliveryActi: These trade goods cannot be rejected. After acceptance, they will arrive by the agreed delivery method and the current state will be saved.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.TradeReturnIntro: Escrowed trade items have been returned.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.SupportNoticeActi: This letter concerns support personnel. Confirm it to continue the arrangement.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.SupportRequestAct: Allow this colonist to temporarily join your colony? If accepted, they will arrive immediately and leave on their own when the term ends.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.SupportPermanentR: Allow this colonist to permanently join your colony? If accepted, they will arrive immediately.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.SupportRequestInt: {SENDER} has sent colonist {PAWN} to support you.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.SupportReturnIntr: Support colonist {PAWN} is ready to return. Reason: {REASON}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.SupportAcceptBusy: Support arrival is already being handled.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.SupportConfirmBus: Support arrival is already being handled.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.GiftAcceptBusy: Gift delivery is already being handled.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.SupportConfirmUpl: Recording the colony after support arrival.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.SupportConfirmBui: Could not prepare the record after support arrival
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.SupportConfirmEmp: There is no support colonist to confirm.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.AllianceCancellat: {SENDER} has broken the alliance with you.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.AllianceRequestAc: Accepting will make this player your ally.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.AllianceCancellat: This player's relationship is now neutral.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.WarDeclarationAct: This player's faction is now hostile to you.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.PeaceRequestActio: Accepting will return this player's relationship to neutral.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.ReadOnlyRejected: This message has ended or was rejected. No further action is required.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.ReadOnlyDelivered: This message has been handled and the result is being saved.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.ReadOnlyConflict: This message conflicts with the current state and cannot be handled automatically.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.EventLetter.RejectUnsupported: This message type cannot be rejected by the current client yet.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftProcessing.RejectPlan: Gift rejected. The items will be returned.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftProcessing.NoGiftDetail: The latest message does not contain a gift.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftProcessing.Rejected: Gift rejected. It will be returned to the sender.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftProcessing.NoPendingConfi: No delivered gift is waiting to be saved.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftProcessing.ConfirmBuildFa: Save preparation after gift delivery failed
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftProcessing.ConfirmEmpty: There is no gift to confirm.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftDelivery.StatusReserving: Removing gift items and preparing to save the current state.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftLanding.StatusSucceeded: Gift delivered by {MODE}: {STACKCOUNT} stacks. Saving the current state.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftLanding.StatusApplied: Gift delivered. Saving the current state.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftLanding.StatusMissingPlan: There is no gift to deliver.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftLanding.StatusMissingCurr: No usable current map is available for gift landing.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftLanding.StatusMapMismatch: Current map {CURRENT} does not match server target map {TARGET}.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftLanding.StatusNoItems: This gift has no deliverable items.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftLanding.StatusNoPreparedI: This gift did not create any valid items.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftLanding.StatusPlacementFa: Gift {THING} could not be placed near the current map location.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftLanding.StatusDropCellMis: Could not find a transport pod landing cell.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftLanding.StatusMissingDefN: Gift item {THING} is missing its Def.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftLanding.StatusThingDefMis: The client cannot find gift item type {THING}.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftLanding.StatusInvalidStac: Gift {THING} has an invalid stack count: {COUNT}.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftLanding.StatusPawnPackage: Gift or trade colonist {THING} has incomplete information.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftLanding.StatusCorpsePacka: Gift corpse {THING} is missing its pawn information.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftLanding.StatusAnimalKindM: Gift animal {THING} has no matching animal kind.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftProcessing.StatusNotGiftE: The event is not a gift event.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftProcessing.StatusMissingP: The gift message is missing its item list.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftProcessing.StatusPayloadP: Gift list could not be read: {MESSAGE}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftProcessing.StatusRejectId: Rejecting a gift requires user, colony, and current server save.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftProcessing.StatusTargetMa: Accepting a gift requires a target map from the server.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftProcessing.StatusAcceptPl: Gift receipt is ready. The current state will be saved after delivery.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftProcessing.StatusRejectPl: Gift rejected. It will be returned to the sender.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.RejectRejected: Support colonist rejection rejected by server: {CODE} {MESSAGE}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.Rejected: Support colonist rejected. The server will arrange the return.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Diplomacy.SupportRequestHint: Describe needed troops, timing, threat scale, or other details. Up to {COUNT} characters.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Diplomacy.ConfirmAllianceCanc: Break the alliance with {PLAYER}? Relations will become neutral.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Diplomacy.ConfirmWarDeclarati: Declare war on {PLAYER}? Relations will become hostile.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.PlayerFaction.Report: {PLAYER} is another distant colony. This entry shows your diplomacy, known locations, and dealings with them.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.CaravanGizmoDesc: The caravan has reached a raidable tile. Choose a target and begin the raid.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.PvpDisabled: The server has disabled player raids.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.ConfirmStart: Raid {TARGET} with the current caravan?\n\nAfter confirmation, the target colony will be loaded. When the battle ends, the raid result must be saved successfully.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.TransportPodConfirm: Send the loaded transport pods or shuttle into a raid against {TARGET}?\n\nAfter confirmation, the target colony will be loaded. When the battle ends, the raid result must be saved successfully.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.TransportPodRejectNoColo: At least one mobile colonist is required.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.ConfirmFinishNoPawns: End this raid and upload the settlement?
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.ConfirmFinishWithPlayerP: There are still {COUNT} friendly units on the battlefield.\n\nIf you end the raid now, friendly units still on the battlefield will be treated as lost. End this raid and upload the settlement?
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.AutoFinishNoControllable: The raid battlefield has ended. Uploading settlement.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.SettlementSucceededMessa: Raid settlement uploaded. Confirming attacker save.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.AttackerSnapshotSucceede: Attacker save confirmed. Returning to your colony.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusAttackerSnapshotUp: Saving attacker state after raid end.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusAttackerSnapshotWa: Waiting for the previous save upload before saving attacker state.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusBattleMissingSnaps: The server did not return a defender save.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusMissingPreparedBat: The current save has no raid battlefield to submit: {EVENTID}. Return to the main menu and rejoin the server.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusPrepareSnapshotLon: Saving raid battlefield. Large maps may briefly stop responding; do not force-close the game.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusAttackerPawnNotInC: The attacker is no longer in the caravan.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusTransporterUnavail: The transport pod payload is unavailable.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusSettlementEmptySav: The current save is empty and cannot confirm the raid result.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusSettlementMissingS: The raid is missing the defender's original map.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusSettlementXmlFaile: Raid settlement save could not be read: {MESSAGE}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusSettlementMissingP: The current save does not contain this raid battlefield.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusSettlementMissingM: The current save does not contain this raid battlefield map.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusSettlementMissingL: The raid battlefield map data is incomplete.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusAttackerLossSnapsh: The current save does not match the attacker save bound to this loss event.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusAttackerLossNoCara: No matching caravan was found; applying the server result.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusAttackerLossIncomp: The matching caravan does not match the loss list; applying the server result.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusAttackerLossWrongE: This letter is not a raid loss notice.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusAttackerLossMissin: The raid message has no attacker loss list.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusAttackerLossPayloa: Raid loss list could not be read: {MESSAGE}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.CannotCaptureProtectedDe: Defenders from the raided colony cannot be captured.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusMissingPreparation: The server did not return a raid preparation token.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusNoPawns: The current caravan has no member available as an attacker.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusNoTargets: The current tile has no raidable target.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusSettlementRejected: Raid settlement rejected by server: {CODE} {MESSAGE}; details {VALIDATION}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusSettlementSupportL: Support {PAWN} was reported lost, but could not be removed from the current battlefield.
Battlefield support {PAWN} loss report was rejected by the server: {CODE} {MESSAGE}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusSettlementSucceede: Raid settlement submitted for server processing.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusSettlementSavingLo: Saving raid settlement. Large maps may briefly stop responding; do not force-close the game.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusSettlementFinalDea: Raid settlement wait time expired. The server will apply timeout fallback.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusTargetIncomplete: The target raid information is incomplete and cannot create an event.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.StatusTargetTileMismatch: The caravan is no longer on the target raid tile.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.RestoreInvalidServerTime: Raid {EVENTID} has invalid server time and cannot be restored.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.RestoreMissingLocalBattl: The server has unfinished raid {EVENTID}, but this save has no recoverable battle map.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Raid.RestoreServerAlreadySett: The server has ended this raid. Refreshing events.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.CaravanGizmoDesc: The caravan has reached a reinforceable tile. Choose one member to join the target colony as support.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.ConfirmSend: Send {PAWN} to support {TARGET}?\nThis colonist will leave the current caravan and wait for the other colony to receive them.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.TransportPodOrbitalDi: Cannot send support to orbital target {TARGET}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Transporters.OrbitalNonHostil: Cannot send a shuttle or transport pod with colonists to neutral or allied orbital target {TARGET}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.DurationDialogPermane: Current choice: permanent support. This colonist will not return automatically.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.DurationDialogTempora: Current choice: temporary support. This colonist will return automatically when the term ends.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.ArrivalLetterText: {PAWN} has arrived and will temporarily join your colony.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.PermanentArrivalLette: {PAWN} has arrived and joined your colony.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.ReturnArrivalLetterTe: {PAWN} has returned to your people and formed a caravan on the world map.\n\nReason: {REASON}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.LossLetterText: {PAWN} did not return to your colony.\n\nReason: {REASON}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.ApplyLossContextMissi: The local context for support colonist {PAWN} no longer exists. The loss was recorded.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.ApplyLossFailed: Failed to apply the loss for support colonist {PAWN}.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.ApplyLossMarked: Support colonist {PAWN} was recorded as lost.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.ApplyLossWorldPawnsUn: The current save has no available world pawn list, so the support loss cannot be applied.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.ApplyMapMismatch: Current map {CURRENT} does not match support target map {TARGET}.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.ApplyNoMap: No current map is available, so the support colonist cannot join.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.ApplyNoMapRaidAttacke: No current map is available, so the attacker cannot arrive.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.ApplyNotSupportPawn: This event is not an applicable support colonist event.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.ApplyPayloadParseFail: Support colonist information could not be read: {MESSAGE}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.ApplyReturnCaravanCre: Support colonist {PAWN} was rejected; caravan {CARAVAN} was created on tile {TILE}.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.ApplyReturnTileMissin: The rejected support colonist is missing a source tile for return caravan creation.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.FinishedMessage: Support colonist {PAWN} returned to the owner.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.StatusCreated: Support sent; {PAWN} was removed from the caravan.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.StatusReserving: Sending the support colonist and preparing to save the current state.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.StatusPackagingSnapsh: Saving after the support colonist leaves.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.StatusSnapshotBuildFa: Support colonist send save build failed: {REASON}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.StatusReturnDeparting: {PAWN} is leaving the map. The current state will be saved after they leave.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.StatusReturnSnapshotC: {PAWN} has left the map. Their return has been arranged.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.PayloadParseFailed: Unable to read support colonist information.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.StatusFinishLocalRemo: The server accepted the support return, but {PAWN} could not be removed locally.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.StatusNoPawns: The current caravan has no member available to send.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.StatusNoTargets: The current tile has no reinforceable target.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.StatusPawnNotInCarava: This colonist is no longer in the current caravan.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.StatusTargetTileMisma: The caravan is no longer on the target reinforcement tile.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.ConfirmCancelAcceptedMe: Cancel your acceptance of this trade order? This only removes your reminder and does not prevent other players from accepting or completing the trade.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.ConfirmCancelOrder: Withdraw this trade order? Reserved offered items will be returned to you, and players who accepted it will be notified.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.CaravanExchangeApplied: Delivered {REQUESTCOUNT} required item entries; the caravan received {STACKCOUNT} stacks.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.CaravanFulfillGizmoDesc: The caravan has reached a tradeable tile. Submit carried items to complete an accepted trade order.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.CaravanInventoryInsuffi: Local caravan inventory is insufficient and cannot remove: {THING}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.ConfirmCaravanFulfillTi: Use the current caravan to fulfill this trade order?
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.ConfirmNoRequestedThing: You will not receive any goods from this trade. Continue?
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.ConfirmNoOfferedThings: You will not receive any goods after fulfilling this trade order. Continue?
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.FeeWithFixed: Fee: <color=#d7dadb>{FEE} silver</color> (includes fixed custody fee {FIXED}, available {AVAILABLE})
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.FulfillCompletedMessage: Self-pickup trade completed; syncing current save.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.NoAcceptableOrders: The trade market has no acceptable trade orders.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.NoMoreOfferableThings: No more offered goods can be added.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.NoOfferableThings: The current map has no tradable items, animals, or slaves.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.NoOrdersInScope: No trade orders in this view.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.NoSelectedTradeThings: Select offered goods or requested goods.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.RequireBeaconRange: Only use items in trade beacon range; turn off to use beacons and all storage
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.SelectedRequests: Selected requests (count, quality, and hit points are minimum requirements)
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.SelectOrderForDetails: Select a trade order to view details.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusAcceptMemoExists: This trade order has already been accepted.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusCaravanNotAtOwner: The caravan has not reached the publisher's tile for this trade order.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusCancelAcceptedMem: Only your own active acceptance of an unfinished trade order can be cancelled.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusCancelNotAllowed: Only your own unfinished trade orders can be withdrawn.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusCancelSucceeded: Trade order withdrawn. Notified {COUNT} accepting players.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.ConfirmDropPodFulfillTi: Complete this trade order by drop pod?
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusConfigMissingCrea: Server address, user, colony, or current save is not configured; cannot create a trade order.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusConfigMissingMark: Server address, user, colony, or current save is not configured; cannot view the trade market.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusConfirmBuildFaile: Self-pickup trade completion save preparation failed: {CODE} {MESSAGE}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusDraftMissingThing: Trade order is missing offered or requested items.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusDropPodPostageIns: Insufficient drop-pod postage silver: need {NEEDED}, available {AVAILABLE}.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusDropPodReservedLo: Removed {THINGCOUNT} drop-pod delivery item entries and {POSTAGE} silver postage.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusDropPodUnreachabl: This trade order is currently unreachable by drop pod and cannot be sent.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusFulfillPackagingS: Preparing the save after trade completion.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusFeeReservationInc: Fee reservation incomplete; {REMAINING} silver was not removed.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusQuotingFee: Confirming the fee with the server.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusFulfillCompletedU: Self-pickup trade completed. Saving current state.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusFulfillLocalApply: Server accepted the self-pickup trade, but the local caravan exchange failed: {MESSAGE}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusReceivedPawnResto: Received trade colonist could not be restored: {THING}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusReceivedThingDefM: Received trade item type is missing: {THING}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusMissingAcceptMemo: Trade order has not been accepted, so it cannot be delivered by caravan.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusMissingOrderEvent: Trade order is not registered by the server yet and cannot be accepted.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusNoFulfillableCara: The current caravan tile has no accepted trade orders that can be completed.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusNoMapCreate: No current map; cannot create a trade order.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusNoMapReserve: No current map; cannot remove trade items.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusOrderCreatedReser: Trade order was created, but local reservation failed: {MESSAGE}
Trade order created and local offered items removed.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusOrderReserving: Reserving trade order items and preparing to save the current state.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusOrderPackagingSna: Saving after trade order items leave the colony.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusReservedLocalThin: Removed {THINGCOUNT} offered item entries and {FEE} silver fee.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusSubmittingOrder: Submitting trade order. On success, offered items and {FEE} silver fee will be removed.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusTradeThingOutside: Trade item is outside the selected trade range: {THING}.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusTradeThingInsuffi: Trade item count insufficient: {THING} needs {NEEDED}, current {CURRENT}.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.StatusTradeThingInvalid: A trade item is no longer on the current map or has an invalid count. Reopen the trade order.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.SubmitHintMissing: Requires offered items or requested items, plus enough fee silver.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Trade.SubmitHintReady: Deliver {OFFERCOUNT} entries, request {REQUESTCOUNT} entries. Delivery method is selected by the accepter when completing the trade.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftDelivery.CaravanGizmoDesc: The caravan has reached another colony tile. Deliver gifts to the target.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftDelivery.ForcedCaravanGiz: The caravan has reached a hostile colony tile. Force-deliver items to the target.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftDelivery.Title: Caravan item delivery
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftDelivery.StatusNoTargets: This caravan tile has no deliverable target.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftDelivery.StatusTargetTile: The caravan has left the target tile and cannot deliver.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftDelivery.StatusTargetInco: The target is missing user, colony, map, or save information.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftDelivery.StatusLocalRemov: The delivery was arranged, but local caravan item removal failed: {MESSAGE}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftDelivery.StatusNormalCrea: Gift sent. {MESSAGE} Upload a save to confirm caravan state.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftDelivery.StatusForcedCrea: Forced delivery sent. {MESSAGE} Upload a save to confirm caravan state.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftDelivery.TransportPodForc: Force-deliver these transport pod contents to {TARGET}?\n\nForced delivery cannot be rejected, but it is still limited by hostility, online status, unsettled raids, and forced-delivery cooldown.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftDelivery.TransportPodReje: Free colonists cannot be sent as gifts
Quest lodgers cannot be sent as gifts
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftDelivery.StatusThingInval: The delivery item is no longer in the caravan or has an invalid count.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftDelivery.StatusReserved: Removed {COUNT} delivered item entries from the caravan.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.GiftDelivery.StatusMapReserve: Removed {COUNT} delivered item entries from the current map.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.AutoOfflineEventsAppliedMessa: Handled {COUNT} distant message(s); confirming them now.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SnapshotConfirmationFailure.M: {OPERATION} was not saved to the server. Continuing would leave the local save out of sync with the server save. Retry the upload, or return to the main menu and re-enter the server.\n\nCurrent error: {MESSAGE}
{OPERATION} was not saved to the server. Continuing would leave local state out of sync with the server save. Retry the upload, or return to the main menu and re-enter the server.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SnapshotConfirmationFailure.W: Processing. The game remains paused until this finishes.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SnapshotConfirmationFailure.R: No confirmation upload is available to retry.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ColonyRelocation.CommandDesc: Settle this caravan here and abandon the old colony using vanilla rules. Normal play cannot continue until the server saves the new state.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ColonyRelocation.Title: Confirm colony relocation
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ColonyRelocation.Warning:
<color=#ffd166>You will abandon {COLONY} using vanilla rules and found a new colony on tile {TILE}.</color>

People, animals, items, and buildings not carried by the caravan will not be preserved. After relocation succeeds, the new tile will become your only colony.

Relocation must save progress afterward. If saving fails, you can only retry the upload or return to the main menu and rejoin the server.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ColonyRelocation.NotConfigure: You are not connected to a server, so server colony relocation cannot run.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ColonyRelocation.MissingSnaps: The current game has no server save, so the colony cannot be relocated.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ColonyRelocation.InvalidTarge: The relocation target is no longer valid.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ColonyRelocation.DisabledMult: Multiple local player colonies exist, so single-colony relocation cannot run.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ColonyRelocation.DisabledAtom: A server sync operation is already running.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ColonyRelocation.DisabledRemo: A distant map or raid is active.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ColonyRelocation.StatusSettli: Founding the new colony using vanilla rules.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ColonyRelocation.StatusAbando: Abandoning the old colony using vanilla rules.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ColonyRelocation.StatusConfir: Waiting for the server to save relocation.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ColonyRelocation.LocalAnchorI: After relocation, the save contains an unexpected colony count: {COUNT}.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.AlertExplanation: <color=#ff6b6b>The bank loan is overdue.</color> Current total due: <color=#d7dadb>{TOTAL} silver</color>.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.ConfirmCreate: Borrow <color=#d7dadb>{PRINCIPAL} silver</color> from the bank for <color=#9ad3ff>{DAYS} game days</color>?\n\nSilver will arrive by transport pod and a repayment quest will be created.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.ConfirmRepay: Repay <color=#d7dadb>{TOTAL} silver</color>?\n\nSilver will be removed locally, the repayment quest will end, and the current state must be saved.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.CreateHint: Amount and duration must be within the server loan limits.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.DebtDuePendingRepayment: <color=#ffd166>Repayment waiting for progress to be saved</color>
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.LoanPreview: Estimate: principal <color=#d7dadb>{PRINCIPAL}</color>, interest <color=#d7dadb>{INTEREST}</color>, total due <color=#d7dadb>{TOTAL} silver</color>.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.DueSoonLoanLetterText: Your loan of <color=#d7dadb>{TOTAL} silver</color> will become overdue soon. Time remaining: <color=#ffd166>{TIME}</color>.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.NoStatus: Bank status has not been loaded.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.OverdueNoMap: The bank loan is overdue, but no usable colony map is available.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.OverdueRaidFailed: The overdue bank loan could not be processed.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.OverdueRaidText: <color=#ff6b6b>Because the debt is overdue, the bank has drawn a wave of mechanoids to your colony.</color> Current total due: <color=#d7dadb>{TOTAL} silver</color>.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.PsychicWhisperText: Unpaid bank debt is weighing on the colony.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.QuestDescription: Borrowed {PRINCIPAL} silver from the bank; interest {INTEREST}; repay {TOTAL} silver by the deadline.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.QuestDescriptionWithLate: Borrowed {PRINCIPAL} silver from the bank; interest {INTEREST}; late fee {LATEFEE}; current total due {TOTAL} silver.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.QuestFullDescription: The bank issued a {PRINCIPAL} silver loan. Duration {DAYS} game days, interest {INTEREST}, total due {TOTAL}.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.StatusActiveLoan: Current loan total due {TOTAL} silver, status {STATUS}.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.StatusBusy: A server operation is already running.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.StatusConsumeSilverFaile: Repayment silver removal was incomplete; remaining {REMAINING}.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.StatusCreateDurationInva: Loan duration must be between {MIN} and {MAX} game days.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.StatusCreated: <color=#7ecf6b>Bank loan issued</color>: received <color=#d7dadb>{PRINCIPAL} silver</color>, total due <color=#d7dadb>{TOTAL} silver</color>.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.LoanArrivalLetterText: The bank has delivered <color=#d7dadb>{PRINCIPAL} silver</color> by transport pod.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.StatusMissing: The server did not return bank status.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.StatusMissingDebt: The server did not return applicable debt data.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.StatusNoMap: No usable colony map is available for this bank operation.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.StatusPlaceSilverFailed: Loan silver could not be placed.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.StatusReady: Colony wealth {WEALTH}, loan range {MIN}-{MAX} silver, annual rate {RATE}%.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Bank.StatusDebtRepaid: <color=#7ecf6b>Repaid debt</color> of <color=#d7dadb>{TOTAL} silver</color>. Saving current state.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.BankDebt.AlertExplanation: <color=#ff6b6b>A bank debt is overdue.</color> Reason: {REASON}; amount <color=#d7dadb>{TOTAL} silver</color>.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.BankDebt.OverdueRaidText: <color=#ff6b6b>Because the debt is overdue, the bank has drawn a wave of mechanoids to your colony.</color> Current total due: <color=#d7dadb>{TOTAL} silver</color>.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.BankDebt.DueSoonLetterText: Your debt of <color=#d7dadb>{TOTAL} silver</color> will become overdue soon. Time remaining: <color=#ffd166>{TIME}</color>.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.BankDebt.QuestFullDescription: The bank is owed {TOTAL} silver. Reason: {REASON}. It becomes overdue after {DAYS} game days.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.AlertExplanation: {PAWN}'s hire term has ended. A recall shuttle will attempt to pick them up.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.ArrivalLetterText: {PAWN} has arrived and begun serving your colony.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.ConfirmHire: Hire a {TIER} {SKILL} mercenary for {DAYS} game days?
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.ConfirmHireWithPric: Spend <color=#d7dadb>{PRICE} silver</color> to hire a {TIER} {SKILL} mercenary for <color=#9ad3ff>{DAYS} game days</color>?
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.EarlyRecallDesc: Call a recall shuttle to pick up this mercenary now. The assignment ends after the mercenary successfully leaves.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.EarlyRecallUnavaila: This mercenary cannot be recalled right now.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.HireHint: You need to keep the mercenary safe during the service period.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.InspectWaitingForSh: Waiting to leave by recall shuttle.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.LoadRecallShuttleDe: Start loading the recalled mercenary into this shuttle.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.LoadRecallShuttleAl: {PAWN} is already aboard the recall shuttle.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.LoadRecallShuttleHa: {PAWN} was added to the recall shuttle loading list.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.LoadRecallShuttleQu: {PAWN} was added to the recall shuttle loading list.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.QuestDescription: {PAWN} is a {TIER} {SKILL} mercenary and only performs related work.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.QuestFullDescriptio: {PAWN} is a {TIER} {SKILL} mercenary. Duration {DAYS} game days, price {PRICE} silver. When the term ends, a recall shuttle will pick up the mercenary.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.RecallLetterText: {PAWN}'s hire term has ended. A recall shuttle is coming to pick them up.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.ShuttleDestroyedLet: The shuttle sent to pick up {PAWN} was destroyed. The hired assignment has ended, and the bank registered a <color=#d7dadb>{FINE} silver</color> fine. <color=#ffd166>{PAWN} is no longer under colony control and will try to leave the map.</color>
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.GuardHint: After hiring, the guard team will arrive automatically to help defend your colony during the next player raid.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.GuardConfirmHire: Spend <color=#d7dadb>{PRICE} silver</color> to hire a {TIER} guard team?
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.GuardStatusPurchase: Guard contract prepared. Price {PRICE} silver. Saving current state.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.GuardStatusConfirme: Guard contract is active. Price {PRICE} silver.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.GuardArrivalLetterT: A guard team hired by the defenders has arrived by drop pod. They will help defend this colony.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.StatusBusy: A server operation is already running.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.StatusArrivalPawnMi: The mercenary no longer exists, so arrival cannot be retried.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.StatusArrivalRetrie: Mercenary shuttle arrival retried. Saving current state.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.StatusHired: {PAWN} arrived by shuttle. Price {PRICE} silver. Saving current state.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.StatusMissingContra: No usable mercenary assignment was found.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.StatusNoMap: No usable colony map is available for hiring a mercenary.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.StatusNotConfigured: Server address, user, or colony is not configured; cannot report mercenary incidents.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.HostileBehaviorLett: An incident involving {PAWN} has been handled.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Mercenary.SurgeryViolationLet: An incident involving {PAWN} has been handled.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.QuestDescriptionTempo: {PAWN} came from {OWNER} and will return when the term ends.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.QuestExpiredAlertExpl: {PAWN}'s temporary support term has expired. They will try to return to their home colony.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.QuestFullDescriptionP: {PAWN} was sent by {OWNER} as permanent support. They will not return automatically unless a later settlement event handles them.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.QuestFullDescriptionT: {PAWN} was sent by {OWNER} as temporary support. They will return to their home colony on their own when the term ends.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.EarlyReturnDesc: Order this temporary support colonist to leave the map and return to their home colony.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Support.EarlyReturnUnavailabl: This support colonist cannot be sent back right now.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.AbandonColony.CommandDesc: Abandon this colony through the server. The server will remove its save, site, and related event references, then return to the main menu.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.AbandonColony.StatusNotConfig: Server address, account, or colony is not configured, so the colony cannot be abandoned through the server.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.AbandonColony.StatusSubmittin: Submitting colony abandonment request to the server.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.AbandonColony.StatusSucceeded: The colony was abandoned on the server. Returning to the main menu.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.AbandonColony.Title: Abandon colony
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RemoteWorldObject.ScoutDesc: Scout the latest state of the other colony.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RemoteWorldObject.ObserveAlly: Observe the latest state of an ally.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RemoteWorldObject.ObserveRaid: Watch the latest state of an ongoing raid.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Observation.StatusNotConfigur: Server address, user, or colony is not configured; cannot scout or observe.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Observation.StatusBusy: A server operation is already in progress.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Observation.StatusTargetIncom: The target is missing user, colony, or save information.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Observation.StatusMissingRaid: The observation target is missing the related raid message.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Observation.StatusMissingSnap: The server did not return an observable save.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RemoteSessionMap.CloseDesc: Close the current observation map and return to the normal multiplayer session.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RemoteSessionMap.ActiveSessio: A distant map is already open. Close it or finish the raid first.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RemoteSessionMap.StatusGenera: Loading target map. This may take some time; do not force-close the game.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RemoteSessionMap.StatusInvali: The target tile cannot be used.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RemoteSessionMap.StatusMissin: Distant save contents are missing, so the map cannot be opened.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RemoteSessionMap.PocketMapBlo: Distant maps do not support entering deep pits or other child maps yet.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RemoteMapProjection.StatusDec: Distant map save could not be read: {MESSAGE}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RemoteMapProjection.StatusInv: The save could not be read: {MESSAGE}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RemoteMapProjection.StatusMap: The target map was not found in the save: {MAP}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RemoteMapProjection.StatusNoM: No map was found in the save.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RemoteMapProjection.StatusOri: The original save failed its check.
The original save size does not match.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RemoteMapProjection.StatusPay: The server map save failed check.
The server map save size does not match.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.RemoteMapProjection.StatusScr: Distant map could not be loaded: {TYPE} {MESSAGE}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Status.EventDetailsNotPulled: Message details have not been downloaded yet.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Status.EventQueueNotPulled: Server messages have not been refreshed yet.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Status.GiftNotProcessed: No gift has been processed yet.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Status.NotLoggedIn: Not logged in to the server.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Status.PlayerListNotPulled: Player list has not been pulled yet.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Status.BankNotPulled: Bank status has not been loaded.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Status.MercenaryIdle: No mercenary operation has run yet.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Status.TradeOrderNotCreated: No trade order has been created yet.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Status.WorldMapNotSynced: World map markers have not been synced yet.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Admin.StatusIdle: Admin status has not been loaded.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Admin.StatusRejected: The server rejected the admin request: {CODE} {MESSAGE}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Admin.NotAdministrator: The current user is not an administrator.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Admin.UpdateWorldBaselineDesc: Replace the server world, faction, ideology, and related baselines with the current save. This affects every player; use only when the current save is correct.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.SelectionButtonTip: Click to change the current selection.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Admin.WorldBaselineUpdated: World data updated: factions {FACTIONS}, world objects {WORLDOBJECTS}.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Admin.WorldBaselineInvalid: World setup could not be accepted: {REASON}
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Admin.NoStatus: Server configuration has not been loaded.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Admin.InvalidConfig: This configuration value cannot be used.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Admin.ConfirmDeletePlayerSave: Delete {USER}'s server save? The server will run the abandon-colony cleanup for that player, removing the save, colony site, and related references. The player will enter the new colony flow on next login.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Admin.DevToolsBlocked: Only administrators can use developer tools during a multiplayer session.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Shop.InvalidBuyCount: Count must be above 0 and no higher than stock.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Shop.InvalidSellCount: Count must be above 0 and no higher than demand.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Shop.PriceIncreaseRatioDesc: Price multiplier applied after each purchase or sale by the same player/colony. 1 keeps the price unchanged, 1.2 makes the next price about 120%, and 0.8 makes it about 80%. The minimum price is 1 silver.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Shop.IncompleteListing: Item properties are not selected. Complete the special item properties.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Shop.StatusNoMap: No colony map is available for delivery.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Shop.StatusApplyingSale: Delivering items to the server shop.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Shop.PurchaseArrivalLetterTex: Your purchase of {COUNT} x {THING} has arrived via transport pods.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.Shop.PaymentArrivalLetterText: Payment for selling {COUNT} x {THING} has arrived: <color=#d7dadb>{PRICE} silver</color>.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.TraitTrainer.ConfirmUse: Use the trait trainer on {PAWN} and grant "{TRAIT}"?
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.TraitTrainer.ConfirmUseRandom: Use the random trait trainer on {PAWN}?
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.TraitTrainer.Description: A neurotrainer which induces a selected trait in the user's mind.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.TraitTrainer.Invalid: This trait trainer has no valid trait.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.TraitTrainer.RandomDescriptio: A neurotrainer which induces a random trait in the user's mind.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ColonyAppearance.CommandDesc: Set the colony icon shown to other players on the world map.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ColonyAppearance.Title: Colony icon
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ColonyAppearance.IdeologyMode: Uses ideology icon and color. Other players will see the change after reconnecting or refreshing world markers.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ColonyAppearance.ColorOnlyMod: When Ideology is not active, only the color can be changed; the colony icon stays as the default house.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ThingTransfer.RejectUnfinishe: Unfinished items cannot be transferred between colonies.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ThingTransfer.RejectActiveQue: Books already linked to a quest cannot be transferred between colonies.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ThingTransfer.RejectRelic: Ideology relics cannot be traded or gifted.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ThingTransfer.RejectUnnatural: This unnatural corpse is bound to a local anomaly event and cannot be transferred.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim.ThingTransfer.RejectUnsupport: This item contains state that cannot be transferred safely.
